info.name: New Order Analytics API
info.description:
Laravel service: upload an orders **.csv** and receive total revenue and best-selling SKU (JSON).

**Setup:** Import `Local.postman_environment.json`, select the **Local** environment, and run `php artisan serve` (default `http://127.0.0.1:8000`).

**File type:** The API enforces a single **.csv** (extension + allowed CSV MIME, max 4 MB). **One file row** for key `csv` in form-data; do not attach a second file to the same key. Large files may hit `post_max_size` first (413).

For **Orders — Analytics**, use `tests/Fixtures/allsome_interview_test_orders.csv` or any file named `.csv` with header `order_id,sku,quantity,price`.

formdata.description: Exactly one **.csv** file (max 4 MB). No second file for the same `csv` key. First line: `order_id,sku,quantity,price`. Sample: `tests/Fixtures/allsome_interview_test_orders.csv`.
